title: Build /render endpoint: pooled Chromium HTML->PDF
description: Initial build per pss-purchase-order 9bq.2 design (2026-07-05): POST /render {html, footer{left,right}, page{format,orientation,margin}} -> application/pdf. Pooled browser, JS disabled, all external fetches blocked (self-contained HTML only), service-owned footer with native Page X of Y, X-Api-Key auth, 2MB cap, 30s timeout, Montserrat bundled. Multi-arch Playwright base image (amd64 dev / arm64 Orin).
close_reason: Built and verified locally: container healthy on 8017, PO-shaped sample (embedded logo, 28 lines over 2 pages, certs table) rendered in 372ms, footers correct. Probes: bad key 401, missing html 400, external img fetch blocked while render proceeds. Sample PDF sent to Steve.
